Text.Page:
Seir's been asking for you, .

It's your call, but I wouldn't keep him waiting.

{@LinkCreature:63#1048} saw something troubling at the Collegium Arcane late last night: gulas, she says.

Get the details from her and head up the investigation. If she's right, this could be serious.

They were gulas, all right. I didn't get that close, but I know what I saw...and smelled.

They were looking through a book—the one about {@LinkCreature:424#2000}, the goat demon. When they saw me, they tore the page with the summoning spell out of the book and vanished.

They left a Kazuur Syndicate token. They must have come here from Ostgarath.

That's all I know. Maybe someone at {@Rgn:12013} can tell you more. They deal with the syndicate.
The Kazuur Syndicate? Their stronghold is west of here, near a place called the {@Rgn:12003}. You really don't want to go there.<NEXTPAGEBUTTON>"I do, and I'll tell you why."</NEXTPAGEBUTTON>

That's quite a story. And {@LinkCreature:424#2000} sounds like something I don't want to see when I close my eyes tonight.

If you're determined to go, you'll have to fight your way through the {@Rgn:12003} to get to the {@Rgn:9024001}.

Good luck.
(This teleportal will transport you to the {@Rgn:9024001}.)

You've done the federation a great service by killing {@LinkCreature:424#2000}, . We'd like to recognize that with a token of appreciation.

And of course our everlasting thanks. But you're used to that by now, right?

Maybe you don't fully appreciate the gravity of the situation. {@LinkCreature:424#2000} must die, and I've chosen you to kill it.

Don't come back again until the deed is done.
